title: Markdown practice
intro: Recreate what you see in the target preview using markdown. Your answer is scored by character closeness to the reference after normalizing line endings. Each challenge passes at 80% or higher.

challenges.prompt: Write a level-2 heading with the exact text: Quick start
Write one sentence that contains the word important in bold (use ** around the word).
Create a bullet list with exactly two items: First item and Second item (use - for bullets, one item per line).
